purpose.name: Thel 'Vadam (the Arbiter)
purpose.description: Disgraced Sangheili commander reborn as suicidal holy warrior
purpose.storyFunction: Parallel protagonist humanizing enemy, exploring dogmatism
purpose.heroComparison: Mirrors Chief as ideological soldier; differs via explicit growth

characterArc.changeDescription: Zealot to disillusioned rebel to alliance leader

believe.earlyHumanityMoment: Stoic dignity under torture; accepts shame without excuses
believe.hiddenInteriorSelf: Wounded pride and growing doubt beneath stoicism
believe.defaultArgumentTactic: Appeals to honor and sacred duty

care.selfRevelation: The Prophets are liars; true honor comes from truth
care.falsePhilosophy: Great Journey is salvation; Prophets speak divine truth
care.falseGoal: Honorable death in service to false gods

fears.hidden: His entire faith was a lie

care.socialProblem: Branded heretic, cast out from his people
care.specificDesireLine: Redemption through death; later preventing Great Journey

invest.plan: Complete suicide missions; later stop Tartarus and the rings
invest.introductoryAction: Being tried and tortured, stoically enduring

opponent.name: Tartarus
opponent.exploitsWeakness: His faith and obedience to the Covenant
opponent.moralConflict: Truth vs. blind obedience to the Prophets
